name: Mackerel, Wasabi
steps: Leave in iced water for 20 mins to remove excess blood.
Salt and lightly salt for 2.5 hours. Rinse and dry.
Remove membrane from the skin and pickle in the liquid 45 minutes.
Infuse the ginger and kombu in the vinegar.
Add all the ingredients together and infuse 10 minutes, then pass.
Add the pickling liquid to the daikon and cook at 85C for 1 hour.
Slice the mackerel into 1.5cm pieces and place on plate.
Place 4 strips of the daikon on the plate and garnish with the wasabi and pennywort.
